recommendation.title: Single-Leg Call — Slight OTM, Enter Post-Earnings
recommendation.entryNote: ⚠️ Q1 2026 earnings May 7 — IV RANK is 90.58 (near extreme). IV at 97%, extremely elevated. ENTER AFTER May 7 to avoid severe IV crush. Post-earnings IV likely drops to 55–65%. Bull thesis: GPU Monitoring launch (April 22) addresses key AI cost pain point; 650 AI-native customers; AIP observability platform as 'must-have.' Strong Q4 2025 beat and in-line Q1 guidance.

companyOverview: Cloud observability and monitoring platform. GPU Monitoring tool launched April 22 — directly addresses AI infrastructure cost optimization, the #1 pain point for enterprises running AI workloads. 650 AI-native customers; 19 spending $1M+/year. Q4 2025: revenue $953.2M (beat $916.5M), EPS $0.59 (beat $0.55). FY2025 revenue +29% YoY. Q1 2026 guidance: $951–961M, EPS $0.49–0.51. Stock down 19% YTD despite strong AI platform positioning.

financials.note: IV Rank 90.58 — near extreme, avoid pre-earnings

catalysts: GPU Monitoring (April 22) — first-mover in AI compute cost observability
